SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.synthesis

Class CompressionProposal

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.synthesis.CompressionProposal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class CompressionProposal extends Object implements Serializable
Result of FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuildCompression(CompressionDuty).

A compression proposal carries the assembled ProcessSystem (compressors + inter-stage coolers, optionally an after-cooler), the chosen number of stages, the per-stage pressure ratio, a human-readable rationale, and the total estimated shaft power once the process has been run.

The engine does not automatically run the proposed process; the caller controls when convergence happens so that downstream changes (e.g. integration with an existing network) can be applied first.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • CompressionProposal

      public CompressionProposal(ProcessSystem processSystem, int stages, double perStagePressureRatio, String rationale, List<String> stageNames)
      Creates a compression proposal.
      Parameters:
      processSystem - the assembled flowsheet (non-null)
      stages - number of compression stages
      perStagePressureRatio - per-stage ratio (geometric)
      rationale - human-readable description
      stageNames - ordered list of compressor unit names, oldest first

  • Method Details

    • getProcessSystem

      public ProcessSystem getProcessSystem()
      Returns the assembled process.
      Returns:
      non-null process system

    • getStages

      public int getStages()
      Returns the number of compression stages.
      Returns:
      stage count

    • getPerStagePressureRatio

      public double getPerStagePressureRatio()
      Returns the per-stage geometric pressure ratio.
      Returns:
      per-stage pressure ratio

    • getRationale

      public String getRationale()
      Returns the rationale string.
      Returns:
      non-null rationale

    • getStageNames

      public List<String> getStageNames()
      Returns the ordered list of compressor unit names.
      Returns:
      non-null list (may be empty)

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns a JSON summary of the proposal. The process system itself is not serialized; the caller can persist it separately via ProcessSystem's lifecycle helpers.
      Returns:
      JSON string
